author: y4rr
content: Plan: Sprint B.5.d implements 4 torchvision parity issues. #870: CIFAR::from_dir (binary batch format) + synthetic fixtures + conformance test. #871: IO round-trip tests (PNG lossless exact, JPEG lossy tolerant). #872: Distribution-moment tests for stochastic transforms (RandomFlip p=0.5 → ~50% rate over N=10000). #874: IMG_EXTENSIONS already matches torchvision (verify and document). Will create subissues per task.
